name: America Jones
description: AJ. The toughest Parking Enforcement Officer in the not-too-distant dystopian cyberpunk future, where a 6x3 metre rectangle of road surface is worth killing for. Armed with a Palomino 61M Assault PTD and the patience of no one.

name: Navy Girl
description: Mayflower Shipman. Fighting Magical Girl and decorated naval officer. Accompanied by SKYHAWC — her Specialized Kinetic Yield High Altitude Weapon Carrier. The acronym still has a second K problem.

name: Air Force Girl
description: Captain Ariel McFly. Once destroyed a hardened underground installation by carrying Army Girl to near-earth orbit and executing an improvised dive bombing run. The Streamers' most aeronautically committed member.

name: Army Girl
description: Anti-armor specialist. Can punch an opposing tank with sufficient force to detonate its magazine and pop the turret off like a cork. Demonstrated against T.H.R.E.A.T.'s Werewolf Brigade at the Battle of Thar.

name: Diva
description: Diva Beelze. A demon girl with one very specific aspiration: to be an angel. The titular character of Angry Viking Press's Evil Diva. Her whole arc takes place in a demonic high school where the supernatural is entirely routine.

name: Loki
description: Guidance counsellor. Steeple-fingered, perpetually scheming. His only real professional complaint about the student body is their habitual tardiness to the bell.

name: Virgil
description: The principal. Presides over a school where demonic heritage is an administrative detail, not a disciplinary issue. Shares Loki's exasperation about punctuality.

name: Adrienne Ashe
description: The star, as John put it. Gets colored in first. Jeremy Whitley's Princeless heroine, drawn with obvious affection in multiple pieces including a Big Planet Comics exclusive variant cover for Princeless: The Pirate Princess #1.

name: Drew
description: AJ's significantly less heroic partner. Quick to point out that they are heading toward the source of trouble rather than away from it. A useful counterweight.
